description: david beckham homme deodorant spray has a woodsy and spicy fragrance referencing soccer player David Beckham. Beckham has stated that the inspiration for this was to create a modern, masculine fragrance that reflects his style. Top notes are citrus, ginger and pepper. Quantity: 150 ml Caution Flammable Keep away from sources of ignition Keep away from children Do not use near fire, flame or heat Avoid spraying near the eyes
